title: F3b syntactically valid, nonexistent BBL 5999999999 -> []
capture_method: live curl GET by M1-T002 producer, tokenless, single KB-scale request (polite shared-pool use)
notes: Valid pattern (borough 5, block 99999, lot 9999), no such lot. Connector must return an explicit no_match result: not an error, never an invented record.
